blocker: No gradient training in this frozen-LLM repo; implemented as an in-context exemplar-pool ablation (cascade-only vs mixed vs none). Full sweep capped by ~15min compute so a reduced real run was used; glm-5p2 is saturated (simple ceiling, cascade floor) so transfer is inconclusive at n=4 — config exposes seeds/incidents/model to run a powered sweep.
one_line: Built cascade-only training config + leakage-clean simple-vs-cascade pass@1 transfer harness (3 exemplar configs, deterministic judge, Wilson CI); real glm-5p2 run in ~4min shows H1=H2=0 (saturated/under-powered): cascade-only neither helped cascade nor hurt simple at this budget.
